text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Wood, fire, earth, metal, and water—the five
elements.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
From firewood to fire, to a meal of the earth's
bounty. By maintaining that chain before you run,
you'll improve both physically and mentally!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Repetition of basic cycles like these is a part of
feng shui. I'm gonna stick to it every day until
summer training camp is over!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!
choice_data_list: Kick it up a gear, Rickey!
Kick it up a gear, Rickey!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey trains diligently every single day.
As for whether it paid off...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Trainerrr, I'm exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's worn to the bone, but it's clear just by
looking at her how much she's leveled up her
game.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You've really impressed me, Rickey. I always
thought you were the more out-there, mysterious
type...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But now I know you're a harder worker than
anybody. It's like I had you all wrong.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
A hard worker? You really think so? All I do is try
and figure out the right path, then charge straight
down it.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I just wanna make everyone happy. And
Trainer teaches me how to improve so I can do
just that. ♪
choice_data_list:
You did a great job of keeping up with the
training.

You did a great job of keeping up with the
training.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yep! Falco's support really helped!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's covered in dirt and sand from head to toe.
It's proof that she gave everything she had.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If Hokko Tarumae could see Copano Rickey now,
maybe it would rekindle her spirit...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
...It's so frustrating, not being able to encourage
Tarumae directly.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I could send her a picture, but I think it'd just
make her feel worse, and I don't want to push her
away even more. She's got higher standards for
herself than anyone.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Not even feng shui can help us here...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The qi vein connecting Copano Rickey and
Hokko Tarumae remains weak. All we can do is
entrust the matter to fate.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I think it might be time for a certain Umadol
to shine!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I might be able to help out where feng shui
can't.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Say, Rickey? How about we make a video to
commemorate the end of summer camp? ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: A video? Sure.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Rickey! ☆ Lucky! ☆ Super-special training! We
finally made it through our tough summer camp
training schedule!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
With Falco's help, I pushed myself to my limits
and got some amazing results! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's all to make my dream come true—my dream
to use the power of feng shui to make everyone
happy.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So I'm never gonna back down! As long as there
are people out there who only I can bring a smile
to, I've gotta keep moving forward! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That's all from Copano Rickey! ♪ Thanks to
everyone on Falco's UmaTok for watching!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Was that okay, Falco?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yep, that was perfect. ☆ Well, I think that's
about all the help I can give you.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: The rest is up to Tarumae.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't be surprised if she was still watching
Umadol and local idol videos.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: We just have to believe in her and be patient. ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's all to make my dream come true—my dream
to use the power of feng shui to make everyone
happy.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So I'm never gonna back down! As long as there
are people out there who only I can bring a smile
to, I've gotta keep moving forward! ☆
Sniff... Sob!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Smart Falcon's efforts, a crack has
been opened up in Hokko Tarumae's armor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All we can do now is believe that fall will bring a
tailwind that will help her find her bearings—and
push both her and Copano Rickey to greater
heights.
